testcase.name: FiltreJobSearchTest

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //button[normalize-space()='All filters'] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//button[normalize-space()='All filters']"}.
